SECTION 1  
import google.cloud.bigtable  
from google.cloud import bigtable  
import pandas as pd  
from sklearn.ensemble import IsolationForest  
import numpy as np  

client = bigtable.Client(project="your-project-id")  
instance = client.instance("your-instance-id")  
table = instance.table("your-table-name")  

rows = table.read_rows()  
data = []  
for row in rows:  
    data.append(row.cells)  

df = pd.DataFrame(data)  
df.columns = [cell.name for cell in df[0]]  

model = IsolationForest(contamination=0.01)  
model.fit(df)  

anomalies = model.predict(df)  
anomalies_df = df[anomalies == -1]
